title: exp_072 -- Action Smoothness Penalty
hypothesis: The mean policy produces jerky, unstable commands because there is no incentive for temporal coherence. Re-enabling action-difference penalties forces the mean to produce smooth action sequences, reducing reliance on stochastic corrections.
what_to_change: From exp_069 baseline, set d_act_th_coef=0.4, d_act_xy_coef=1.0 (the defaults in train_racing.py). These penalties exist in the reward code but are disabled (0.0) in recent configs.
expected_outcome: Smoother deterministic actions, more stable flight and gate passage. Training reward may decrease but benchmark should improve.
